'''BXET-R2''', nicknamed '''Box''', was an [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droid]] assigned to a [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wing]] [[Starfighter/Legends|fighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|piloted]] by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Flight leader/Legends|flight leader]] [[Wilkins]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. During an [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]] [[Battle of the Vehemence|attack]] on the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Vehemence (Star Destroyer)|''Vehemence'']], Wilkins was blinded and his ship badly damaged in a collision with a [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE/sa bomber]]. With the fighter's pilot incapacitated, Box took control, evading the enemy [[Bomber/Legends|bomber]] and escaping into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]].
